ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adults" (
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adult */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the adult */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Workclass of the adult */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education level of the adult */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status of the adult */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation of the adult */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Relationship status of the adult */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race of the adult */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Sex of the adult */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Native country of the adult */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Income class of the adult */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Actual income amount */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the adult */,
  "is_employed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the adult is currently employed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES income_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the income class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adult's data */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the adult */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the adult */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "monthly_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income amount */,
  "tax_bracket" TEXT /* Tax bracket of the adult */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult's data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
